texto: I'm really all right, she would think, carefully, lightly, as she pulled the key from the ignition, trying not to examine the sensation too closely or lose it with any sudden movement, as if it were a thin-filmed shiny bubble poised in her chest.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tessa Hadley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I'm really all right, she would think, carefully, lightly, as she pulled the key from the ignitio…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, grief, grief-and-loss pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e estudos.

texto: Once they had been equal in their separate freedoms. They had set out to have children as lightly as if they were playing house, and now her necessarily domestic life bored him, and she was bound to it in her body and imagination. This imbalance was fated, built into their biology.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tessa Hadley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Once they had been equal in their separate freedoms. They had set out to have children as lightly…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, thought-provoking, equal pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: Once they had been equal in their separate freedoms. They had set out to have children as lightly as if they were playing house, and now her necessarily domestic life bored him, and she was bound to it in her body and imagination. This imbalance was fated, built into their biology.

texto: Andy was receptive, like a deep vessel into which life was poured. If this terrible particular thing hadn't been poured into her, she would have been happier--it goes without saying--but less of a person. She was filled out by her fate. I actually think that this is quite rare, the capacity to become the whole shape of the accidents that happen to you.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tessa Hadley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Andy was receptive, like a deep vessel into which life was poured. If this terrible particular th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, accidents, fate pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de fate e vida.
